technical_replicate: All experiments, with the exception of proteomics data, were performed in biological and technical triplicates.
experimental_design: comparison of DSA and seco-DSA in LN18 and T98G cell lines
colony formation assays were conducted on LN18 and T98G cell lines.
number_of_samples: 2 biological replicates (cell lines) and no fractionation implies 2 samples.
